evidence.snippet:
Precision Component Testing for the Demands of Critical Systems
---------------------------------------------------------------
Delivering rigorous semiconductor and electronic component testing to include electrical, environmental, mechanical, and chemical testing to MIL-STD-202, MIL-STD-750, MIL-STD-883, and NASA specifications, ensuring your components stand up to the harshest conditions in aerospace, space, defense, and beyond.

*   15+ Years of hands-on expertise in MIL-STD and NASA programs
*   ISO 9001/AS9100 Accredited for electrical, environmental and mechanical testing scopes
*   ISO/IEC 17025 AS6081/AS6171 Accredited for counterfeit mitigation testing and authentication

items.notes: Full-service semiconductor and electronic component testing lab: electrical, environmental, mechanical, chemical testing to MIL-STD-202, MIL-STD-883, NASA specs.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Electronic component testing lab serving aerospace, defense, space, medical, automotive, and industrial sectors. No UXV/drone-specific product line or mention anywhere in the corpus.

evidence.snippet:
### Upscreening
Elevate commercial parts to mission-critical standards through rigorous screening and qualification.

### Counterfeit Mitigation
Detect and prevent counterfeit components with accredited [AS6171](https://aaactl.com/services/counterfeit-mitigation/as6171/)/[AS6081](https://aaactl.com/services/counterfeit-mitigation/as6081/) testing and reporting.

### Counterfeit Mitigation
Detect and prevent counterfeit components with accredited [AS6171](https://aaactl.com/services/counterfeit-mitigation/as6171/)/[AS6081](https://aaactl.com/services/counterfeit-mitigation/as6081/) testing and reporting.

### Failure Analysis
Diagnose root causes with forensic testing backed by high-precision tools and standards.
